You approach a shambling man by the appl: Oh yes! They'll bring the fortune of Reeds to every corner of the Coast!

You approach a shambling man by the appl: A revolution that has proven itself to leave those in need behind.

You approach a shambling man by the appl: So? Who cares, you'll make it. That's all that matters.

You approach a shambling man by the appl: A government with heart.

You approach a shambling man by the appl: A weak state, that will crumble in seconds.

You approach a shambling man by the appl: Those poor little peasants- to think they have been tricked into thinking themselves worthy of ruling.

You approach a shambling man by the appl: The zombie does not object to your campaign speech. In fact, the zombie does not react at all.

You approach a shambling man by the appl: Do not think a lack of thought is somehow admirable.

You approach a shambling man by the appl: Where do you think you'll be, once the future has trampled all over you? Huh?

You approach a shambling man by the appl: Just keep trying. Eventually you'll break this beast.

You approach a shambling man by the appl: Yeah. You've really pissed him off.

You approach a shambling man by the appl: You can tell, since you're such a people's person.
